title: Maestro tasks.jsonl row
description: Schema for a single line of .maestro/tasks.jsonl. Each completed (or abandoned) direction appends one object matching this schema.

issue.description: GitHub issue number for the direction.

title.description: Direction title as the human filed it.

completed_at.description: UTC timestamp in ISO-8601, second precision, Z suffix.

prs.description: PRs that comprised the direction. Omitted or empty for abandoned attempts.

summary.description: One-line observable change in the human's vocabulary.

reason.description: Required when status=abandoned; explains what was tried and what was observed.
